lesson.menu_desc: Report Progress with the Present Continuous & Time Expressions -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- Giving Updates -- Present Continuous & Time Expressions
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Simone Quiles de Santana Marques | Aula 8 -- Giving Updates

listenings.text: Hi Simone, this is Daniel. I am calling about the merger project. The board is meeting on Friday, and they are asking for a full status update. Right now I do not have the latest numbers. Could you tell me where we are? I want to know if the contract review is on track, and if the first deliverable is ready. I am also wondering about the approval. Is it still pending, or are the partners signing this week? At the moment I am preparing my slides for the board, so any progress you can share today really helps. Please send me a short update before lunch. Thank you, and talk soon.

Hello everyone, this is Simone with a quick project update on the Telefonica merger. I am happy to say the project is on track. Right now the team is reviewing the final contract, and we are making good progress. This week we reached an important milestone: both legal teams are approving the main clauses. The first deliverable, the draft agreement, is ready, and I am sending it to you today. We do have one small delay. The tax review is still ongoing, so that part is pending for a few more days. At the moment our partners in Germany are checking the last details, and they are signing early next week. In the next phase, we are preparing the final signature meeting. I will share another update on Friday. Thank you all for your great work.

extra_audio.text: Daniel leaves a voice note asking for a project status update. Simone reads the project tracker and checks the latest progress. They meet on a call and Simone shares each update. Simone explains the small delay and the pending approval. Simone records a two-minute update and sends it to the team.
